title: 11 Herbal Creams For Swollen Feet
description: Arnica montana creams contains sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and essential oils as active constituents. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling in the feet. The sesquiterpene lactones, specifically helenalin and isobutylamides, have been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes, which contribute to swelling. The flavonoids, including kaempferol and quercetin, have antioxidant properties that help protect the skin from damage ...
